Title: Work with Codex from anywhere
Description: Use Codex anywhere with the ChatGPT mobile app. Monitor, steer, and approve coding tasks in real time across devices and remote environments.

Title: Browsers Treat Big Sites Differently
Description: Safari and Firefox change how big sites render based on the domain. TikTok, Netflix, Instagram… even SeatGuru. Chrome doesn’t. Why is that?

Title: GitHub - DepthFirstDisclosures/Nginx-Rift: exploit for CVE-2026-42945
